benefits.title: Best Price Guarantee
benefits.description: We match any lower price you find within 24 hours of booking, no questions asked.

benefits.title: 24/7 Live Support
benefits.description: Our travel experts are available around the clock to assist with any issue.

benefits.title: Flexible Changes
benefits.description: Modify or cancel your booking up to 48 hours before departure for free.

benefits.title: Loyalty Rewards
benefits.description: Earn SkyMiles on every booking and redeem them for free flights and upgrades.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: SkyBook completely transformed how I book flights. The interface is incredibly intuitive and I found deals I never would have discovered otherwise.

testimonials.name: James Okafor
testimonials.text: I've tried every flight booking platform out there. SkyBook is in a different league — fast, clean, and the price alerts are genuinely useful.

testimonials.name: Priya Kapoor
testimonials.text: As someone who travels 200+ days a year, having a platform this reliable and beautiful is everything. My go-to for every trip.
